ops.text: A codex-wrapper workflow lane with a structured-output schema returned schema-minimal garbage instead of failing: the adversarial-refuter lane came back status="findings", summary="test", one finding with claim="test" — a fabricated placeholder that satisfied the JSON schema while the finder lane (same batch, same wrapper) returned a real cited review. Nothing in the return signaled the underlying codex run had produced nothing. A wrapper that can't get a real answer should error the lane (agent() → null) rather than invent schema-valid filler; junk that parses is worse than a visible failure.
